creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #24)

> That said: Does the old WoW64 actually work on FreeBSD?

Old WoW64 works for me, although I had to patch executable paths a bit recently*. The new mode immediately crashes in a way that I don't really understand. I've yet to try new WoW64 with a Linux Wine build under Linux emulation for comparison.

* https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/1f07ec6014a3c3380a731efdc74a3cf88b91ca29#diff-04eaa16fadbb0dcc62021a82efb4ebda345ce317e2d838c5474823e4fd9573a2 and https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/1f07ec6014a3c3380a731efdc74a3cf88b91ca29#diff-f5a78cdfb3a213ac852230c9fe34ef01ffeeaafdd7ea06b7674392a35e704460
